landing.heroSubtitle: The next-generation HR & ATS platform powered by AI. Streamline your hiring process, find the best candidates, and make data-driven decisions.
landing.feature1Desc: Automatically analyze resumes and rank candidates based on job requirements using advanced AI models.
landing.feature2Desc: Visual Kanban-style pipeline with drag-and-drop stages. Track every candidate through your hiring process.
landing.feature3Desc: AI-generated interview questions, scorecards, and feedback analysis to make better hiring decisions.
landing.feature4Desc: Help candidates understand their skill gaps and provide personalized learning recommendations.
landing.feature5Desc: Full support for English and Arabic with RTL layout. Serve a global talent pool.
landing.feature6Desc: Bring your own API key and choose from multiple AI models. No vendor lock-in.
landing.step1Desc: Sign up as a candidate or company. Set up your profile in minutes.
landing.step2Desc: Companies post jobs with AI assistance. Candidates apply with AI-optimized resumes.
landing.step3Desc: Our AI analyzes and matches candidates to positions, scoring compatibility.
landing.step4Desc: Schedule interviews, collect feedback, and make offers — all in one place.
landing.starterDesc: Perfect for getting started with basic hiring needs
landing.growthDesc: For growing teams with advanced AI features
landing.enterpriseDesc: For large organizations with custom needs
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of companies using TalentFlow AI to hire smarter.
landing.testimonial1Text: TalentFlow AI transformed our hiring process. We reduced time-to-hire by 60% and found better candidates than ever before.
landing.testimonial2Text: The AI matching is incredible. Every candidate we interview is highly qualified and a great cultural fit for our team.
landing.testimonial3Text: I found my dream job within two weeks. The AI tools helped me optimize my resume and prepare for interviews perfectly.
landing.newsletterSubtitle: Get the latest hiring insights and AI tips delivered to your inbox.
landing.faq1Q: How does the AI resume screening work?
landing.faq1A: Our AI analyzes resumes against job requirements, scoring candidates on skills, experience, and keyword relevance. It uses advanced NLP models to understand context, not just keyword matching.
landing.faq2Q: Can I use my own AI model or API key?
landing.faq2A: Yes! TalentFlow AI supports OpenRouter integration, allowing you to bring your own API key and choose from dozens of AI models including GPT-4, Claude, and Llama.
landing.faq3Q: Is there a free plan available?
landing.faq3A: Absolutely! Our Starter plan is completely free and includes 5 active jobs, 50 applications per month, and basic AI screening. You can upgrade anytime as your hiring needs grow.
landing.faq4Q: How does the pipeline management work?
landing.faq4A: Our visual Kanban pipeline lets you drag and drop candidates through customizable hiring stages. You can add stages, filter by job, and track every candidate seamlessly.
landing.faq5A: We take security seriously. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your information with third parties, and you maintain full control over your data at all times.
landing.faq6A: Yes, TalentFlow AI fully supports English and Arabic with RTL layout support. We are actively working on adding more languages based on user feedback.
landing.integrationsSubtitle: Seamlessly integrate with the tools you already use
landing.teamDesc: Our leadership team brings decades of experience in HR tech, AI, and enterprise software.

interviewPrep.behQ8: How do you handle feedback and criticism?
interviewPrep.techQ4: Explain the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases
interviewPrep.techQ7: Explain the concept of eventual consistency
interviewPrep.techQ8: What are the main principles of SOLID design?
